title: pavonia oblongifolia
intro: Pavonia oblongifolia, also known as Mexican Rose Mallow or Pavonia, is a type of flowering plant in the mallow family (Malvaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of Pavonia oblongifolia include treating various ailments such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antidiabetic properties. Herbal preparations of Pavonia oblongifolia can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
